title: Kaposvár, Somogy — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kaposvár, Somogy: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kaposvár is a city in Somogy with a population of 61,441. A charming city in southwestern Hungary, known for its beautiful Csiky Gergely Theatre, the Rippl-Rónai Museum, and the nearby Lake Balaton region.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
